global_rules: A raw paper must pass capability coverage before material execution starts.
Generic implementation workers may not replace a missing domain specialist.
Core-ready packs can execute with existing workers.
Pack templates are not execution approval; they become usable only after specialist workers, permissions, evals, review and Hermes binding are created.
If a surface is unknown and capability_coverage_required=true, the card must block until a pack is created or explicitly waived by a human gate.

web-saas-core.plain_purpose: Covers ordinary web apps, SaaS products, APIs, persistence, auth, integration, tests, docs, release and monitoring.
web-saas-core.activation_rule: Available by default for ordinary web/product software when no specialized template-only surface is present.

cloud-native-core.plain_purpose: Covers CI/CD, runtime, deploy wiring, cloud security, observability and rollback planning.
cloud-native-core.activation_rule: Available by default for non-secret cloud/runtime wiring; production authority still requires human and release gates.

agent-runtime-core.plain_purpose: Covers Hermes, agents, skills, MCP, browser/memory/tool-risk and autonomous workflow changes.
agent-runtime-core.activation_rule: Available by default after agent_eval_plan, permission class and reviewer separation exist.

solana-quasar-core.plain_purpose: Covers Quasar-first Solana program work, PDA/CPI/account maps, compute units, wallet transactions and onchain QA.
solana-quasar-core.activation_rule: Available for Quasar-first work only; Anchor or Pinocchio require a separate optional pack and human decision.

mobile-app-pack.plain_purpose: Covers native or React Native mobile apps, device UX, app-store constraints, mobile wallet flows and mobile performance.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Mobile apps need device lifecycle, native packaging, store constraints and mobile-specific performance ownership.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create profile, permission class, mobile eval, simulator/device smoke and Product Face mobile proof.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Mobile execution needs device/simulator QA, deep-link, offline, permission and app lifecycle coverage.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Add mobile QA plan, simulator proof, accessibility proof and release checklist.

mobile-app-pack.activation_rule: Block material mobile execution until the pack is activated or explicitly waived with a human gate.

desktop-app-pack.plain_purpose: Covers desktop apps, local runtime, installers, OS permissions, auto-update, packaging and desktop UX.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Desktop products need packaging, OS integration, permissions and update-path ownership.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create profile, packaging proof, installer smoke, rollback/update proof and desktop Product Face proof.

desktop-app-pack.activation_rule: Block desktop execution until the pack is activated for the selected runtime.

game-product-pack.plain_purpose: Covers playable games, 2D/3D runtime, gameplay systems, asset pipeline, performance, economy and playtest loops.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Games need runtime loop, physics/rendering, input, performance and asset-pipeline ownership.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create runtime profile, playable smoke, FPS/performance proof and rollbackable asset pipeline.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Playable products need mechanics, progression, feedback, onboarding and fun/clarity review.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create design eval, playtest checklist and independent game UX review.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Game QA needs playtest, input, timing, frame, save-state and edge-case coverage.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create playtest protocol, automated smoke and performance budget evidence.

game-product-pack.activation_rule: Block game execution until the game pack is activated for 2D, 3D, web, mobile or onchain game scope.

ai-ml-product-pack.plain_purpose: Covers AI/ML products, model selection, RAG, evaluation, data quality, prompt/tool safety and model monitoring.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: AI products need model/data/eval ownership beyond generic agent runtime work.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create eval harness, model/data contract, safety review and monitoring proof.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Model behavior must be evaluated with positive, negative, abuse, drift and regression cases.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create dataset/eval schema, baseline, regression suite and reviewer separation.

ai-ml-product-pack.activation_rule: Block AI/ML execution until model/data/eval contracts are activated.

fintech-payments-pack.plain_purpose: Covers payments, ledgers, billing, reconciliation, financial correctness, fraud and compliance-sensitive money movement.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Money movement needs ledger invariants, idempotency, reconciliation and refund/chargeback ownership.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create ledger invariant tests, idempotency proof, reconciliation proof and human release gate.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Fintech work needs fraud, compliance, privacy and operational risk review before execution.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create risk checklist, compliance matrix and independent review evidence.

fintech-payments-pack.activation_rule: Block fintech/payment execution until the pack is activated and human/security gates exist.

regulated-domain-pack.plain_purpose: Covers domains where product correctness depends on regulation or high-stakes domain rules.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Regulated products need domain-specific legal/compliance boundaries before implementation.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create jurisdiction/domain evidence packet, compliance review, human gate and scope-limited disclaimers.

regulated-domain-pack.activation_rule: Block regulated-domain execution until a domain compliance pack is created for the exact jurisdiction and product class.

data-analytics-pack.plain_purpose: Covers analytics, ETL, metrics, dashboards, data quality, warehousing and BI surfaces.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Analytics products need metric definitions, data quality, lineage and dashboard correctness.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create metric contract, data quality tests, lineage proof and dashboard proof.

data-analytics-pack.activation_rule: Block analytics-heavy execution until metric/data contracts are activated.

browser-extension-pack.plain_purpose: Covers browser extensions, Manifest V3, content scripts, extension permissions and store packaging.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Extensions need permission, content-script, background/service worker and store review ownership.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create extension profile, permission review, browser smoke and packaging proof.

browser-extension-pack.activation_rule: Block extension execution until extension-specific security and packaging proof exist.

operator-onboarding-pack.plain_purpose: Covers external operator install, first local smoke, Hermes adapter handoff and first walkthrough.
operator-onboarding-pack.activation_rule: Available by default for public onboarding and operator walkthrough work that does not mutate a real Hermes runtime.
input_contract: operator-owned Hermes target or deferred adapter boundary

public-docs-knowledge-pack.plain_purpose: Covers public-safe docs, examples, knowledge artifacts, guides and repository navigation for external users.
public-docs-knowledge-pack.activation_rule: Available by default for documentation and knowledge artifacts when generated evidence stays out of the public repo.

local-web-cockpit-pack.plain_purpose: Covers local-first web cockpit work that projects factory status snapshots without becoming source of truth or requiring Discord.
local-web-cockpit-pack.activation_rule: Available by default for local cockpit planning and implementation only when status snapshots remain canonical and Discord is not required unless explicitly requested.
output_contract: local cockpit UI or proof artifact

hardware-iot-pack.plain_purpose: Covers hardware, IoT, firmware, robotics and physical-device products.

missing_worker_templates.why_needed: Physical products need device, firmware, safety and hardware test ownership not present in the current factory.
missing_worker_templates.promotion_condition: Create domain expert pack with hardware test bench, safety review and rollback/recovery model.

hardware-iot-pack.activation_rule: Always block until a dedicated hardware/IoT pack is installed for the exact product.
